query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  COALESCE(
    CASE 
      WHEN name ~ ' x\d+\.?\d*($|\s)' THEN 
        CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '.* x(\d+\.?\d*)(?:$|\s).*', '\1') AS NUMERIC)
      ELSE 1
    END,
    1
  ) AS multiplier
FROM slaves
WHERE name LIKE '%x%';

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', cr.timestamp)    AS timestamp,
  cr.slave_id,
  AVG(cr.value * 
    COALESCE(
      -- Extract multiplier from slave name using regex
      -- Match patterns like "x400A", "x400.28A", "x400" but NOT "x400V"
      CASE 
        WHEN s.name ~ 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)[^V]' OR s.name ~ 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)$'
        THEN (regexp_match(s.name, 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)'))[1]::float
        ELSE 1
      END,
      1
    )
  )          AS value,
  AVG(cr.value_reactive * 
    COALESCE(
      -- Apply same multiplier to reactive power
      CASE 
        WHEN s.name ~ 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)[^V]' OR s.name ~ 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)$'
        THEN (regexp_match(s.name, 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)'))[1]::float
        ELSE 1
      END,
      1
    )
  ) AS value_reactive
FROM consumption_realtime cr
JOIN slaves s
  ON cr.slave_id = s.id
WHERE
      -- start *after* the bucket containing last_ts
      cr.timestamp >  ('{{{ msg.payload.last_energy_ts }}}'::timestamptz
                       + INTERVAL '5 minutes')
  AND cr.timestamp <= ('{{{ msg.payload.last_energy_ts }}}'::timestamptz
                       + INTERVAL '1 hour')
  AND (cr.value / 3.0) <= (
    CASE COALESCE(s.clamp_type::text, '0')
      WHEN '0' THEN 50
      WHEN '1' THEN 100
      WHEN '2' THEN 400
      WHEN '3' THEN 1000
      WHEN '4' THEN 2000
      WHEN '5' THEN 1600
      WHEN '6' THEN 1000
      ELSE 0
    END * 220
  )
GROUP BY timestamp, cr.slave_id
ORDER BY timestamp, cr.slave_id;

name: function 11

query:
WITH raw_ts AS (
  -- 1) use exactly what the cloud sent, or fall back to the first 2023+ reading
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF('{{{ msg.payload.last_water_ts }}}','')::timestamptz,
      (
        SELECT MIN(timestamp)
          FROM channel_pulse_log
         WHERE timestamp > '2025-01-01T00:00:00Z'
           AND channel   = 1
      )
    ) AS start_ts
),
channel_info AS (
  -- 2) lookup your per-slave multiplier
  SELECT
    slave_id,
    MAX(
      COALESCE(
        (regexp_match(name, 'x([0-9]+\\.?[0-9]*)'))[1]::float,
        1
      )
    ) AS multiplier
  FROM channels
  WHERE channel = 1
    AND type    = 'flow_sensor'
    AND slave_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY slave_id
),
bounds AS (
  -- 3) from that start_ts, either take a full hour (if there's data),
  --    or jump to the end of the very next non‐empty 5m bucket
  SELECT
    r.start_ts,
    CASE
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
          FROM channel_pulse_log c
          JOIN channel_info ci ON c.slave_id = ci.slave_id
         WHERE c.timestamp >  r.start_ts
           AND c.timestamp <= r.start_ts + INTERVAL '1 hour'
           AND c.channel   = 1
           AND c.value     > 0
           AND c.value     < 10000
      )
      THEN r.start_ts + INTERVAL '1 hour'
      ELSE (
        SELECT MIN(time_bucket('5 minutes', c2.timestamp) + INTERVAL '5 minutes')
          FROM channel_pulse_log c2
          JOIN channel_info ci2 ON c2.slave_id = ci2.slave_id
         WHERE c2.timestamp > r.start_ts
           AND c2.channel   = 1
           AND c2.value     > 0
           AND c2.value     < 10000
      )
    END AS end_ts
  FROM raw_ts r
),
main_data AS (
  -- 4) aggregate _all_ pulses in that (start_ts, end_ts] window
  SELECT
    time_bucket('5 minutes', c.timestamp)  AS bucket_start,
    c.slave_id,
    SUM(c.value)                            AS sum_value,
    (SUM(c.value) * ci.multiplier) / 1000   AS value
  FROM channel_pulse_log c
  JOIN channel_info    ci ON c.slave_id = ci.slave_id
  JOIN bounds          b  ON TRUE
  WHERE
        c.timestamp >  b.start_ts
    AND c.timestamp <= b.end_ts
    AND c.channel   = 1
    AND c.value     > 0
    AND c.value     < 10000
  GROUP BY bucket_start, c.slave_id, ci.multiplier
)
-- 5) return exactly one row _and_ use end_ts as the returned timestamp
SELECT
  (SELECT end_ts FROM bounds) AS timestamp,
  slave_id,
  sum_value,
  value,
  1                            AS channel
FROM main_data
ORDER BY timestamp DESC, slave_id
LIMIT 1;

query:
WITH LastTimestamp AS (
  SELECT MAX(timestamp) AS max_timestamp
  FROM channel_pulse_log
),
TimeDiff AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    channel,
    value,
    slave_id,
    reading,
    LAG(timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY slave_id, channel ORDER BY timestamp) AS prev_timestamp,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (timestamp - LAG(timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY slave_id, channel ORDER BY timestamp))) AS time_diff_seconds
  FROM channel_pulse_log
  WHERE
    channel = 1
    AND timestamp >= (SELECT max_timestamp - INTERVAL '30 minutes' FROM LastTimestamp)
    AND timestamp <= (SELECT max_timestamp FROM LastTimestamp)
),
Outliers AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    channel,
    value,
    slave_id,
    reading,
    time_diff_seconds,
    (time_diff_seconds * 3) AS max_allowable_value
  FROM TimeDiff
  WHERE
    value > (time_diff_seconds * 3)
    AND value > 10
),
UpdatedRows AS (
  UPDATE channel_pulse_log cpl
  SET value = 0
  FROM Outliers
  WHERE
    cpl.timestamp = Outliers.timestamp
    AND cpl.slave_id = Outliers.slave_id
    AND cpl.channel = Outliers.channel
    AND cpl.value = Outliers.value
    AND cpl.reading = Outliers.reading
  RETURNING cpl.slave_id
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS affected_rows,
  ARRAY_AGG(slave_id) AS affected_slave_ids
FROM UpdatedRows;

name: Map status to device

query:
SELECT 
    c.slave_id,
    c.channel,
    c.name AS channel_name,
    s.name AS slave_name,
    MAX(cpl.timestamp) AS last_reading
FROM 
    channels c
LEFT JOIN 
    channel_pulse_log cpl ON c.slave_id = cpl.slave_id AND c.channel = cpl.channel
LEFT JOIN 
    slaves s ON c.slave_id = s.id
WHERE 
    c.name LIKE 'Hidr.%'
  AND c.slave_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    c.slave_id, c.channel, c.name, s.name
HAVING 
    MAX(cpl.timestamp) < NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours'
    OR MAX(cpl.timestamp) IS NULL;

SELECT 
    s.id AS slave_id,
    s.name AS slave_name,
    MAX(cr.timestamp) AS last_reading
FROM 
    slaves s
LEFT JOIN 
    consumption_realtime cr ON s.id = cr.slave_id
WHERE 
    s.type = 'three_phase_sensor'
GROUP BY 
    s.id, s.name
HAVING 
    MAX(cr.timestamp) < NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours'
    OR MAX(cr.timestamp) IS NULL;

query:
SELECT
    slave_id,
    avg_value,
    TO_CHAR(period, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.MS"Z"') AS period
FROM (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        AVG(value) AS avg_value,
        time_bucket('15 minutes', timestamp) AS period
    FROM consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id IN ({{msg.payload.id}})
        AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.payload.start}}' AND '{{msg.payload.end}}'
    GROUP BY
        slave_id,
        period
) bucketed
ORDER BY period DESC

rules.to: (	      $rule := $lookup(rules, current.rule);	      {	          current.rule: (	              $ids := $split(current.id, ',');	              $grouped := $reduce(payload, function($acc, $va) {	                  (	                      $key := $string($va.slave_id);	                      $prev := $lookup($acc, $key);	                      $merge([$acc, {$key: $append($prev, $va.avg_value * $rule.keyMulti)}])	                  )	              }, {});	              $map($ids, function($v) {	                  (	                      $old:=$lookup($lookup(data, current.rule),$lookup($rule.slaves, $trim($v)).cloud_id);	                      $id_num := $number($trim($v));	                      $raw := $lookup($grouped, $string($id_num));	                      $values := $type($raw) = "array" ? $raw : $type($raw) = "number" ? [$raw] : [];	                      (	                      $value:=$count($values) > 0 ? (	                                  $rule.aggregation = "AVG" ? $average($values) :	                                  $rule.aggregation = "MIN" ? $min($values) :	                                  $rule.aggregation = "MAX" ? $max($values) :	                                  $rule.aggregation = "SUM" ? $sum($values) :	                                  $rule.aggregation = "COUNT" ? $count($values) :	                                  $values[0]	                              ) : "No data";	                      	                        $mytrig:=$type($value)="number"?	                                    (	                                      ($rule.operator = "GT" and $value > $rule.value) or	                                      ($rule.operator = "GTE" and $value >= $rule.value) or	                                      ($rule.operator = "LT" and $value < $rule.value) or	                                      ($rule.operator = "LTE" and $value <= $rule.value) or	                                      ($rule.operator = "EQ" and $value = $rule.value) or	                                      ($rule.operator = "NEQ" and $value != $rule.value) or	                                      (	                                      $valeH:= $type($rule.valueHigh) = "number"?	                                          $rule.valueHigh	                                          :	                                          0;	                                      ($rule.operator = "BETWEEN" and ($value >= $rule.value and $value <= $valeH)) or	                                      ($rule.operator = "OUTSIDE" and ($value < $rule.value or $value > $valeH))	                                      )	                                    )	                                    :	                                    (	                                        $type($old.triggered) = "boolean" ?	                                        $old.triggered :	                                        false	                                    ) ;	                          {	                              $lookup($rule.slaves, $trim($v)).cloud_id: {	                                  "triggered": $mytrig,	                                  "local_id": $trim($v),	                                  "time": $old.triggered = $mytrig?	                                    $old.time :	                                    $now(),	                                  "status": $lookup(slaves, $trim($v)),	                                  "value": $type($value) = "number"?	                                  $round($value,2) :	                                  $value	                              }	                          }	                      	                      )	                  )	              }) ~> $merge()	          )	      }	  )

(	        	        $aux:=$lookup(var, $k);	        $cond:= $type(var) = "object"?	                    $type($aux) = "object"	                :	                    false;	                	        {$k:	            [$each($v.slaves, function($va,$ka){	                (	                $old:= $cond ?	                    $lookup($aux, $ka);	                $filtered_old:=[$each($old, function($vb,$kb){	                    $now_ms - $toMillis($kb) < $v.duration or $v.duration=0 ?	                    {$kb:$vb}	                })]~>$merge();	                $new:=$lookup(payload, $metric&"_"&$ka);	                	                {	                    $ka: 	                    $merge([	                    (	                        $type($old) = "object"?	                            $filtered_old	                        :	                            {}	                    ),	                    ($type($new) = "object" ? ($oldtrigger = $newtrigger and $type($old.time) = "string"?	                                            $old.time :	                                            $now()	                                        ) :	                                        $now(),	                                    "alldata": $new 	                                }	                              }	                          )	                      })]~>$merge()	                  }	              )	          )	      })]~>$merge()	  )

function($startAt, $endAt){	          (	              $ls := $number($substringBefore($startAt,':'))*60+$number($substringAfter($startAt,':'));	              $le :=  $time >= $ls or $time < $le	          )	      };		      $preserveTime := function($ruleKey, $cloudId){	          (	              $p := $lookup($lookup(payload, $ruleKey), $cloudId);	              $type($p) = "object" and $p.triggered = false and $type($p.time) = "string" ?	                  $p.time	              :	              (	                  $d := $lookup($lookup(data, $ruleKey), $cloudId);	                  $type($d) = "object" and $d.triggered = false and $type($d.time) = "string" ?	                      $d.time	                  :	                      $now_str	              )	          )	      };		      [$each(rules, function($v, $k){	          (	              $active := $lookup($v.daysOfWeek, $today) and $inTimeRange($v.startAt, $v.endAt);	              $exist := $lookup(payload, $k);		              {	                  $k: $active and $type($exist) = "object" ?	                      $exist	                  :	                      [$each($v.slaves, function($va, $ka){	                          (	                              $status := $lookup(slaves, 'sl_'&$ka).status;	                              {	                                  $va.cloud_id: {	                                      "triggered": false,	                                      "value": "Out of Rule Range",	                                      "values": [],	                                      "alldata": [],	                                      "time": $preserveTime($k, $va.cloud_id),	                                      "local_id": $ka,	                                      "status": $type($status) = "string" ? $status : "offline"	                                  }	                              }	                          )	                      })]~>$merge()	              }	          )	      })]~>$merge()	  )

name: Get channels
Get channels
query:
SELECT slave_id
FROM channels
WHERE name ILIKE '%idr%'
AND slave_id IN ({{msg.water}})

name: Get water
query:
SELECT 
    slave_id, 
    MAX(value) AS max_value
FROM Channel_pulse_log

WHERE 
slave_id IN ({{msg.water}})
AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.time.start}}' AND '{{msg.time.end}}'

GROUP BY slave_id;

name: Get energy
query:
SELECT 
    slave_id, 
    MAX(value) AS max_value
FROM consumption_realtime

WHERE 
slave_id IN ({{msg.pot3f}})
AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.time.start}}' AND '{{msg.time.end}}'

GROUP BY slave_id;

name: Get energy
query:
SELECT 
    slave_id, 
    MAX(value) AS max_value
FROM consumption_realtime

WHERE 
slave_id IN ({{msg.potsw}})
AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.time.start}}' AND '{{msg.time.end}}'

GROUP BY slave_id;

name: Get temp
query:
SELECT 
    slave_id, 
    AVG(value) AS media_value
FROM temperature_history

WHERE 
slave_id IN ({{msg.temp}})
AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.time.start}}' AND '{{msg.time.end}}'

GROUP BY slave_id;

rules.to: (	$aux:=	[$map(payload, function($v){	    {$string($v.id):{"status":$v.status, "name":$v.name}}	})]~>$merge();		{	    "pot3f": [$each(pot3f, function($v,$k){	        (	            $slave:=$lookup($aux, $k);	            $slave.name & "  |  ID " & $k & "  |  " & $slave.status & "  |  " & "POT "&$v	        )	    })],	    "water": [$each(water, function($v,$k){	        (	            $slave:=$lookup($aux, $k);	            $slave.name & "  |  ID " & $k & "  |  " & $slave.status & "  |  " & "Hidr "&$v	        )	    })],	    "potscd": [$each(potscd, function($v,$k){	        (	            $slave:=$lookup($aux, $k);	            $slave.name & "  |  ID " & $k & "  |  " & $slave.status & "  |  " & "SCD "&$v	        )	    })],	    "temp": [$each(temp, function($v,$k){	        (	            $slave:=$lookup($aux, $k);	            $slave.name & "  |  ID " & $k & "  |  " & $slave.status & "  |  " & "Temp "&$v	        )	    })]	}		)
